pageLimit.description: The page limit is the maximum number of pages returned when creating a query. The default is 5.

url.description: The URL for your GitLab instance (ex: gitlab.domain.com). Leave blank if you use gitlab.com

secureValues.description: Provide information to grant access to this data source. To learn more about access tokens, [click here.](https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/user/profile/personal_access_tokens.html)
